title: CONNECT:COMMUNE
artist: FLAVOR FOLEY ft. Hatsune Miku V4X English

lines.ja: this is how it ought to be?
lines.en: this is how it ought to be?

lines.ja: Just another day, throw your cares away
lines.en: Just another day, throw your cares away

lines.ja: The world you know, always running to and fro
lines.en: The world you know, always running to and fro

lines.ja: But don't be scared, I'm not going anywhere!
lines.en: But don't be scared, I'm not going anywhere!

lines.ja: So just don't touch the dial and stay here a while with me!
lines.en: So just don't touch the dial and stay here a while with me!

lines.ja: don't you find it all romantic, the way things used to be?
lines.en: don't you find it all romantic, the way things used to be?

lines.ja: To trip the light fantastic, repeat it after me!
lines.en: To trip the light fantastic, repeat it after me!

lines.ja: This is how it should be, in studio seats
lines.en: This is how it should be, in studio seats

lines.ja: My ego wired in the CRT

lines.ja: 10 9 8, for the sake of the way it ought to be.

lines.ja: Just another day, throw your cares away

lines.ja: Who cares what people say, we'll stay another day in revelry, reverie!
lines.en: Who cares what people say, we'll stay another day in revelry, reverie!

lines.ja: 1 2 3, who's the brightest star you see?
lines.en: 1 2 3, who's the brightest star you see?

lines.ja: The world you know never seems to take it slow
lines.en: The world you know never seems to take it slow

lines.ja: So don't delay, I'll be here to save the day!
lines.en: So don't delay, I'll be here to save the day!
